arts.ttl: Spoiler alert? Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala settles into villa as contract talks loom
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala has moved to Philipp Lahm’s villa in the upscale area of Bogenhausen in Munich, a 20-minute drive away from Säbener Straße. The Germany international has just moved into Philipp Lahm’s villa per Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Report: Amid rib issue, Bayern Munich’s Manuel Neuer will start vs. FC Augsburg
arts.sum: According to the latest reports, Manuel Neuer has (at least temporarily) overcome his rib ailment and will be ready to go against FC Augsburg in the Bundesliga later today. Manuel Neuer will be in goal against Augsburg today despite rib problems!

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Augsburg: Live stream, Gamethread, How to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. After three weeks of club football’s absence, it’s back and Bayern Munich is raring to go against fellow southern club FC Augsburg.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: After all of that, could Alphonso Davies stay at Bayern Munich?; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Iggy Pop; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich can compete in those arenas, but is probably unable to take down clubs like Real Madrid, Manchester United, or even FC Barcelona if push came to shove on a total package. According to a report from Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies would actually like to stay in Bavaria, but needs the salary numbers to be to his liking.

arts.ttl: Bayern chief aims clear dig at new England boss Thomas Tuchel - "Like night and day!"
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel left Bayern Munich at the end of the 2023-2024 season after overseeing the club's first trophyless season in 12 years as Vincent Kompany was installed as his replacement

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'identify' Alphonso Davies alternative transfer target
arts.sum: Real Madrid have identified an alternative transfer target to Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies.
Action from the German top flight returns after the international break and Alex Jack is on hand to provide score predictions for all nine Bundesliga games this weekend.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach, exec rave over improved play from Kim Min-jae
arts.sum: Bayern Munich center-back Kim Min-jae has been experiencing a resurgence after a tough second half of the season during the 2023/24 campaign. Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl has also seen an uptick in performance from Min-jae and his defensive partner, Dayot Upamecano.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Augsburg Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their unbeaten start to the season when they face off against Augsburg in the Bundesliga tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game...

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Augsburg
arts.sum: The Bundesliga returns after the international break with the opening game of the match day being a duel in Bavaria as Bayern Munich host Augsburg. The biggest doubt heading into…
